headline: Wall Street Money Managers Hunker Down as Iran War Rages On
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Five weeks of war with Iran have wiped trillions off global stocks, pushed oil past $100 and kept it there and repriced wagers on interest rates and inflation. This week was supposed to bring clarity on when, and how, all that disruption would end. Investors are still waiting.President Donald Trump’s primetime address on Wednesday signaled more attacks and imminent peace simultaneously, offered no framework for reopening the Strait of Hormuz and effectively told allies to figure i

headline: Meta Platforms Price Target Trimmed by Wells Fargo
summary: Wells Fargo trimmed its price target on Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) to $765 from $856 while maintaining an Overweight rating ahead of quarterly results. The cut acknowledges near-term macro uncertainty, but the firm’s core thesis remains intact: risk/reward looks attractive for investors willing to hold through the noise heading into earnings. headline: Amazon Is Wells Fargo’s Top Internet Pick for 2026
summary: Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) just picked up a fresh vote of confidence from Wells Fargo, which raised its price target to $305 from $304 while maintaining an Overweight rating and naming Amazon its top Internet pick for 2026. The call centers on two converging forces: AWS revenue acceleration and a long-awaited positive inflection in free cash flow ... Amazon Is Wells Fargo’s Top Internet Pick for 2026

headline: 1 Bank Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Banks use their capital and expertise to help businesses grow while offering consumers essential financial products like mortgages and credit cards. These institutions have benefited from improved net interest margins and robust credit growth, so it’s no surprise the banking industry has posted a 3.7% gain over the past six months while the S&P 500 was down 2.8%.

headline: How The Churchill Downs (CHDN) Investment Story Is Shifting Around iGaming Risk And Upside Potential
summary: With Churchill Downs, the headline shift is a modest US$1 trim to Wells Fargo’s price target, which now sits at US$124 while the central fair value estimate remains at US$135.50. That small adjustment is tied to analysts weighing iGaming expansion risk in Virginia against what they still describe as a viable growth story and an Overweight stance. Read on to see how bullish and bearish voices are shaping the evolving narrative and what it could mean for how you track this name from...

headline: How The Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI And Valuation Resets
summary: Cadence Design Systems is working through a refined analyst view, with the modeled fair value shifting from US$384.20 to US$371.68 as part of the latest update. Analysts link this change to sector wide software volatility. At the same time, they point to execution on earnings, recurring software demand tied to AI, and raised long term EPS estimates as support for the story. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving market narrative around Cadence and what to...
